title: Scheduler Appointment Loader Async
description: Defines the asynchronous loader function type for scheduler appointments.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: Function type for asynchronously loading appointments based on a date range.

props.name: AXSchedulerAppointmentLoaderAsync
props.description: Asynchronous function that takes a date range and returns a promise resolving to an array of appointments for that period.

parameters.name: range
parameters.description: The date range for which to load appointments.

returns.description: Promise that resolves to an array of appointments for the specified date range.
